REMAINING (operator, needs fresh AWS auth — session expired mid-run): cd infra/terraform && terraform init && terraform plan (expect exactly: ~ aws_cloudwatch_metric_alarm.deploy_errors modified + aws_cloudwatch_metric_alarm.root_disk_pressure added) && terraform apply. compiled_state.description:
## Reproduction Steps
1. Put autodeploy into a steady failing state (e.g. incident 2731's missing volume): after backoff reaches the 900s cap, it emits roughly one AUTODEPLOY_ERROR per 15 minutes.
2. infra/terraform/monitoring_autodeploy.tf alarms on deploy_errors > 0 for 2 consecutive 5-minute periods — a single breaching period followed by quiet ones never latches.
3. Result: 21+ consecutive deploy failures over ~41h (Jul 8–10) with no operator alert.

**Expected:** a permanently failing deploy loop pages within ~1h. **Actual:** silent for 41h; discovered only when disk exhaustion vetoed reviews.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Alarm reliably latches under the 900s-backoff steady state (e.g. longer period / Sum over 30–60 min, eval 1–2) — demonstrated by cadence math or metric replay.
- [ ] Verify the probe actually publishes the metric (terraform applied) as part of the fix.
- [ ] Add a root-filesystem disk-free alarm for the box (proven veto mechanism).
- [ ] File paths: infra/terraform/monitoring_autodeploy.tf.
compiled_state.title: autodeploy deploy_errors CloudWatch alarm cadence is mismatched to the 900s backoff — 41h of failures never drove action
